resource.name: cutPatternCanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Cut pattern' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: cutPatternListCanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Cut pattern list' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: trimProgramCanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Trim program does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: trimLotCanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Trim lot' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: lotsBrCountryMismatch
resource.object: Trim lot's born in does not match the born in of the lot.\nPlease check the born in settings of both the lot and the trim lot.\n

resource.name: lotRiCountryMismatch
resource.object: Trim lot's raised in does not match the raised in of the lot.\nPlease check the raised in settings of both the lot and the trim lot.\n

resource.name: lotValidOnlyFrom
resource.object: Lot's valid day is from {0}. Check out the deboning lots production day.

resource.name: lotValidOnlyTo
resource.object: Lot's valid day is to {0}. Check out the deboning lots production day.

resource.name: trimlotValidOnlyFrom
resource.object: Trim lot's valid day is from {0}. Check out the deboning lots production day.

resource.name: trimlotValidOnlyTo
resource.object: Trim lot's valid day is to {0}. Check out the deboning lots production day.

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit.

resource.name: noRecAnimalMissing
resource.object: Can't record since animal is missing

resource.name: noRecLotMissing
resource.object: Can't record since lot is missing

resource.name: doDeleteItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete the item?

resource.name: doPrintItem
resource.object: Do you want to print the item?

resource.name: doDelQuestion
resource.object: Do you want to remove {0} from the list?

resource.name: patternRootTaskGroupMissing
resource.object: Pattern root node has no taskgroup.

resource.name: patternRootTaskGroupInvalid
resource.object: Pattern root node's task group is invalid.

resource.name: noRecPhValueMissing
resource.object: Can't record since PH is missing.

resource.name: noRecRfidMissing
resource.object: Can't record since RFID is missing.

resource.name: ClonePatternError
resource.object: An error ocurred while cloning pattern.

resource.name: DeleteNodePrompt
resource.object: Do you want to delete the selected node?

resource.name: CanelChangesError
resource.object: By cancelling the changes is an error ocurred.

resource.name: VerifyNodeDeletionError
resource.object: An error ocurred while verifying node deletion operation.

resource.name: NoAccess
resource.object: You do not have access to edit tasks.

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit.

resource.name: noRecAnimalMissing
resource.object: Can't record since animal is missing

resource.name: noRecLotMissing
resource.object: Can't record since lot is missing

resource.name: doDeleteItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete the item?

resource.name: doPrintItem
resource.object: Do you want to print the item?

resource.name: AlreadyRegistered
resource.object: Animal already recorded on this lot

resource.name: NoPatternMatched
resource.object: No pattern matched - No lot selected

resource.name: FoundNoItem
resource.object: Found no item from barcode value {0}.

resource.name: FoundManyItems
resource.object: Found more than one item from barcode value {0}.

resource.name: InvalidBarcodeLenght
resource.object: Barcode {0} is not of correct length.

resource.name: DoCreateAnimal
resource.object: Do you want to create an animal record for missing label?

resource.name: animalMustHaveOne
resource.object: Animal must have QA mark {0} attached to it.

resource.name: animalMustHaveAllOf
resource.object: Animal must have all of the following QA marks {0} attached to it.

resource.name: NewTattooFailed
resource.object: Failed to save new tattoo value.

resource.name: OldTattooFailed
resource.object: Failed to save old tattoo value.

resource.name: UpdateIndividualFailed
resource.object: Failed to update individual record in database.

resource.name: MeatPerformanceLineProcessUnitNoLotCreateRules
resource.object: Process unit has no lot creation rules attached

resource.name: MeatPerformanceLineUnknownError
resource.object: Unknown error. Activate tracing for more information.

resource.name: MeatPerformanceLineNeedToSelectCuttingPattern
resource.object: You need to select a cutting pattern

resource.name: MeatPerformanceLineErrorLoadingLastItem
resource.object: Got an error loading stations last item. Activate tracing for more information.

resource.name: MeatPerformanceLineProductsDoNoMatchCreateNewLot
resource.object: Products do not match previously created products. Press OK to create a new lot or Cancel to revert operation.

resource.name: MeatPerformanceLineNoPrinterUnitOperation
resource.object: The configuration flag PrinterUnitOpId is not configured.

resource.name: MeatPerformanceLineFailedToRunCloseUnitOp
resource.object: Failed to run unit operation before closing deboning lot / lot.

resource.name: doDeleteItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete the item?

resource.name: doPrintItem
resource.object: Do you want to print the item?

resource.name: stationMissing
resource.object: Station Id missing. See base_sysprograms.xmldata for sysprogram {0}

resource.name: trimlineMissing
resource.object: Trimming line Id missing. Check xmldata in the user interface items

resource.name: doDeletePiece
resource.object: Do you want to delete piece?

resource.name: noProdMatParStaChosen
resource.object: You must choose at least one product, product type, parent product or a station

resource.name: infoLabel.Text
resource.object: Selected lines can't be deleted because they are currently in use in the cut patterns listed below

resource.name: PatternUsageText
resource.object: Selected task is used in following cut patterns:

resource.name: TaskNotUsedInPattern
resource.object: Task is not used in any patterns

resource.name: infoLabel.Text
resource.object: One or more nodes can't be deleted because they are currently active on station(s) listed below

resource.object: You must select one or more record

resource.name: DeleteItemsPrompt
resource.object: Do you want to delete selected items

resource.name: DeleteSingleItemPrompt
resource.object: Do you want to delete selected item

resource.name: NoMatchingAiField
resource.object: Application identifier for lot not found in barcode

resource.name: NoUnitFoundFromBarcode
resource.object: No active unit found from barcode

resource.name: LotAlreadyAssigned
resource.object: Lot '{0}' already active on process unit

resource.name: PrunitStateNoChangeLot
resource.object: Process unit state not allowing lot change

resource.name: DoCancelItem
resource.object: Do you want to cancel the item?

resource.name: WeightNotValid
resource.object: Weight is not valid, try again.

resource.name: htoolActivateYields
resource.object: Activate all yield changes in production

resource.name: ActivateYieldError
resource.object: Activate standard yields completed with errors

resource.name: GetDeboningSystemsError
resource.object: An error occured while getting deboning system information.

resource.name: ClonePatternError
resource.object: An error ocurred while cloning pattern.

resource.name: DeleteNodePrompt
resource.object: Do you want to delete the selected node?

resource.object: By cancelling the changes is an error ocurred.

resource.name: VerifyNodeDeletionError
resource.object: An error ocurred while verifying node deletion operation.

resource.name: QuestionToMoveNode
resource.object: Do you want to move source {0} to new location?

resource.name: OperationFailed
resource.object: Operation fail. See system log for detaild.

resource.name: infoLabel.Text
resource.object: One or more nodes can't be deleted because they are currently active on station(s) listed below

resource.name: MaxPWeightLower
resource.object: Piece max weight can't be lower than piece min weight

resource.name: MinPWeightHigher
resource.object: Piece min weight can't be higher than piece max weight

resource.name: MaxAWeightLower
resource.object: Animal max weight can't be lower than animal min weight

resource.name: MinAWeightHigher
resource.object: Animal min weight can't be higher than animal max weight

resource.name: MaxAFatLower
resource.object: Animal max fat can't be lower than animal min fat

resource.name: MinAFatHigher
resource.object: Animal min fat can't be higher than animal max fat

resource.name: MaxAgeLower
resource.object: Animal max age can't be lower than min age

resource.name: MinAgeHigher
resource.object: Animal min age can't be higher than max age

resource.name: MaxAPhLower
resource.object: Animal max pH value can't be lower than animal min pH value

resource.name: MinAPhHigher
resource.object: Animal min pH value can't be higher than animal max pH value

resource.name: ConfirmedStatus
resource.object: Confirmed status {0} for order line {1} in order {2}

resource.name: BoxText
resource.object: Order line status has changed, please confirm.

resource.name: InitialText
resource.object: Notifications initiated for order line status changes

resource.name: BoxText
resource.object: Order line status has changed, please confirm.

resource.name: confirmClearBuffer
resource.object: Are you sure that the expected piece {0} has already left the buffer?

resource.name: bufferCleared
resource.object: Buffer was cleared. Please put the next piece, {0}, into the buffer and click Retry

resource.name: failedtoclearBuffer
resource.object: Failed to clear the buffer. Result was {0}

resource.name: ProductWaitingInBuffer
resource.object: Product {0} is waiting in buffer. Timeout at {1}

resource.name: questiontomovenode
resource.object: Do you want to move source {0} to new parent node {1}?

resource.name: NothingSelected
resource.object: At least one configuration must be selected.

resource.name: NoStableWithinTimeLimit
resource.object: No stable weight received during record interval

resource.name: noStationChosen
resource.object: No station is chosen to send message to.

resource.name: NotSimpleMode
resource.object: Switching to manual mode to process tasks

resource.name: CannotProcesTaskPieces
resource.object: Can not automatically process pieces with task

resource.name: DoCancelItem
resource.object: Do you want to cancel the item?

resource.name: doPrintItem
resource.object: Do you want to print item {0}?

resource.name: doPrintPack
resource.object: Do you want to print pack {0}?

resource.name: missingExtCodeMessage
resource.object: The pack linked to the created item is missing a ExtCode:

resource.name: doDeleteItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete item {0}?

resource.name: doRestorePiece
resource.object: Do you want to restore piece {0}?

resource.name: tooManyAnimalsChosen
resource.object: Too many animals chosen. Allowed number of animals is {0}

resource.name: GetDeboningSystemsError
resource.object: An error occured while getting deboning system information.

resource.name: SkippedAnimal
resource.object: Animal {0} is already part of simulation. Skipped.

resource.name: InvalidStatusSingle
resource.object: Invalid status for starting the simulation again.

resource.name: InvalidStatus
resource.object: One or more simulation has got invalid status for starting it again.

resource.name: DoQueueSimulations
resource.object: Do you want to queue and start {0} simulation(s)?

resource.name: noStarted
resource.object: Simulation was not started. One may already be running.

resource.name: htoolActivateEmployeeCapabilities
resource.object: Activate employee capabilities for chosen employees

resource.name: GetDeboningSystemsError
resource.object: An error occured while getting deboning system information.

resource.name: errorGettingSystem
resource.object: Error getting system {0}. Employees might not have been updated.

resource.name: capabilitiesLoadedForNotLoggedOn
resource.object: Capabilities reloaded for {0}-{1} which is currently not logged on.

resource.name: SkippedOrder
resource.object: Order {0}-{1} is already part of simulation. Skipped.

resource.name: CouldNotSetActivity
resource.object: Could not set activity on process unit.

resource.name: InvalidWeight
resource.object: Weight is invalid for task line.

resource.name: DoCancelItem
resource.object: Do you want to cancel the piece?

resource.name: typeDoesNotExist
resource.object: Type {0} was not found in assembly {1}

resource.name: executingNewQuery
resource.object: Starting a step in the table popluation at {0}

resource.name: stepsDone
resource.object: All steps done. Inserted {0} rows inserted into the Yield adjustments table.

resource.name: errorOccured
resource.object: {0} errors occurred during the update of {0} records.

resource.name: label1Text
resource.object: Choose date range to use to populate the yield adjustments table.\n\nWarning: all existing data will be lost!

resource.name: toolUpdateAllYieldsLim
resource.object: Update all yields with filtered avg.yield

resource.name: htoolUpdateAllYieldsLim
resource.object: Update all yields with filtered avg.yield

resource.object: Update chosen yields with filtered avg.yield

resource.name: htoolUpdateSelYieldsLim
resource.object: Update chosen yields with filtered avg.yield

resource.object: Do you want to update {0} yields numbers with value from avg.yield?

resource.object: Do you want to update {0} yields numbers with value from filtered avg.yield?

resource.name: doUpdateAll
resource.object: Do you want to update all yields numbers with value from avg.yield?

resource.name: doUpdateAllLimited
resource.object: Do you want to update all yields numbers with value from filtered avg.yield?

resource.name: CloseLotMessage
resource.object: Closing the lot will cancel the pieces on the station.

resource.name: CloseLotTitle
resource.object: Do you wish to close the lot?

resource.name: PiecesCountHigherThanAvailable
resource.object: Number of pieces to pack is higher than available amount.
